summary: DISPLAY bug (install works): install progress bar overshoots — '203.0 MB / 15.0 MB'. Numerator = git-archive download + pip requirements bytes; denominator (totalBytes) = archive-download only. pip wheels (~200MB) get fed into downloadedBytes during the installRequirements phase but never added to totalBytes. Site: routes/downloadManager.js progress path (~:288-326). Lazy fix = flip to INDETERMINATE bar during the pip phase (contract already exists; pip has no honest up-front total). Local+remote both use this path. Surfaced during the MPI-222 RES4LYF baked-drift test. Low priority, cosmetic.

Root: custom_nodes git-archive has no Content-Length (denominator stuck at ~15MB seed) while numerator counts real streamed bytes; pip reqs phase has no honest total either -> 203/15 overshoot. Fix: exclude custom_nodes from BOTH sides of byte ratio (work-not-bytes), show indeterminate Preparing... sweep on node ticks. Both engine paths (_wireProgress + _onRemoteInstallEvent) via shared _byteRatioExcludingNodes helper. Guard: tests/node-install-progress.test.cjs (3). Logic+regression verified; live visual = validating.

DONE, user-verified via RES4LYF node-drift re-clone. Both install phases (git-archive download + Installing custom node requirements) show animated Preparing... sweep, no fake 203/15 ratio. Shipped 94a518e: _byteRatioExcludingNodes excludes custom_nodes from both sides (local+remote), MpiEngineInstall.setProgress honors indeterminate. Weights + engine archive untouched. User accepts the no-number sweep (nodes have no honest up-front total). Guard node-install-progress.test.cjs (3).
Archived out of board.columns.done to .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/_archived/MPI-231/ (workspace preserved intact). mpi-archive run 2026-07-23.
